# netbox_route_target (Resource)

Manages a NetBox route target.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Route target name (e.g., '65000:100').

### Optional

- `comments` (String) Additional comments.
- `description` (String) Description of the route target.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this route target. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `tenant` (Number) Tenant ID that owns this route target.
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing route target with matching name instead of creating a new one.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
